# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_command:
        description: 'Build command to execute (predefined options only)'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - 'npm ci && npm run build'
          - 'npm ci && npm run build:prod'
          - 'npm ci && npm test'
          - 'npm ci && npm run lint && npm run build'
          - 'maven-build'
          - 'gradle-build'
          - 'python-build'
        default: 'npm ci && npm run build'
      environment:
        description: 'Target environment'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - development
          - staging
          - production
        default: development
      node_version:
        description: 'Node.js version (for Node projects)'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - '18'
          - '20'
          - '22'
        default: '20'
      java_version:
        description: 'Java version (for Java projects)'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - '11'
          - '17'
          - '21'
        default: '17'
      python_version:
        description: 'Python version (for Python projects)'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - '3.10'
          - '3.11'
          - '3.12'
        default: '3.11'

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  validate-inputs:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      build_type: ${{ steps.determine-build.outputs.build_type }}
      is_valid: ${{ steps.determine-build.outputs.is_valid }}
    steps:
      - name: Determine build type from predefined command
        id: determine-build
        run: |
          COMMAND="${{ inputs.build_command }}"
          case "$COMMAND" in
            "npm ci && npm run build")
              echo "build_type=node-build" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
              echo "is_valid=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
              ;;
            "npm ci && npm run build:prod")
              echo "build_type=node-build-prod" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
              echo "is_valid=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
              ;;
            "npm ci && npm test")
              echo "build_type=node-test" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
              echo "is_valid=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
              ;;
            "npm ci && npm run lint && npm run build")
              echo "build_type=node-lint-build" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
              echo "is_valid=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
              ;;
            "maven-build")
              echo "build_type=maven-build" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
              echo "is_valid=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
              ;;
            "gradle-build")
              echo "build_type=gradle-build" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
              echo "is_valid=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
              ;;
            "python-build")
              echo "build_type=python-build" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
              echo "is_valid=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
              ;;
            *)
              echo "is_valid=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
              echo "::error::Invalid build command selected. This should not happen with choice inputs."
              exit 1
              ;;
          esac

      - name: Log validated inputs
        run: |
          echo "=== Validated Build Configuration ==="
          echo "Build Type: ${{ steps.determine-build.outputs.build_type }}"
          echo "Environment: ${{ inputs.environment }}"
          echo "Is Valid: ${{ steps.determine-build.outputs.is_valid }}"

  build-node:
    needs: validate-inputs
    if: >-
      needs.validate-inputs.outputs.is_valid == 'true' &&
      startsWith(needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_type, 'node-')
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: ${{ inputs.environment }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ inputs.node_version }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run build (standard)
        if: needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_type == 'node-build'
        run: npm run build

      - name: Run build (production)
        if: needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_type == 'node-build-prod'
        run: npm run build:prod

      - name: Run tests
        if: needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_type == 'node-test'
        run: npm test

      - name: Run lint and build
        if: needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_type == 'node-lint-build'
        run: |
          npm run lint
          npm run build

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        if: always() && needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_type != 'node-test'
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: node-build-${{ inputs.environment }}-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: |
            dist/
            build/
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: warn

  build-maven:
    needs: validate-inputs
    if: >-
      needs.validate-inputs.outputs.is_valid == 'true' &&
      needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_type == 'maven-build'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: ${{ inputs.environment }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Java
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: ${{ inputs.java_version }}
          cache: 'maven'

      - name: Build with Maven
        run: ./mvnw clean verify -B -ntp

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: maven-build-${{ inputs.environment }}-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: target/*.jar
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: warn

  build-gradle:
    needs: validate-inputs
    if: >-
      needs.validate-inputs.outputs.is_valid == 'true' &&
      needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_type == 'gradle-build'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: ${{ inputs.environment }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Java
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: ${{ inputs.java_version }}
          cache: 'gradle'

      - name: Build with Gradle
        run: ./gradlew build --no-daemon

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: gradle-build-${{ inputs.environment }}-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: build/libs/*.jar
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: warn

  build-python:
    needs: validate-inputs
    if: >-
      needs.validate-inputs.outputs.is_valid == 'true' &&
      needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_type == 'python-build'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: ${{ inputs.environment }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ inputs.python_version }}
          cache: 'pip'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install -r requirements.txt

      - name: Run linting
        run: |
          pip install flake8
          flake8 . --count --select=E9,F63,F7,F82 --show-source --statistics

      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          pip install pytest
          pytest --tb=short

      - name: Build package
        run: |
          pip install build
          python -m build

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: python-build-${{ inputs.environment }}-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: warn

  build-summary:
    needs:
      - validate-inputs
      - build-node
      - build-maven
      - build-gradle
      - build-python
    if: always()
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Build Summary
        run: |
          echo "=== Build Summary ==="
          echo "Build Type: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_type }}"
          echo "Environment: ${{ inputs.environment }}"
          echo "Validation: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.result }}"
          echo "Node Build: ${{ needs.build-node.result }}"
          echo "Maven Build: ${{ needs.build-maven.result }}"
          echo "Gradle Build: ${{ needs.build-gradle.result }}"
          echo "Python Build: ${{ needs.build-python.result }}"

      - name: Check for failures
        if: >-
          needs.validate-inputs.result == 'failure' ||
          (needs.build-node.result == 'failure') ||
          (needs.build-maven.result == 'failure') ||
          (needs.build-gradle.result == 'failure') ||
          (needs.build-python.result == 'failure')
        run: |
          echo "::error::One or more build jobs failed. Check the logs above for details."
          exit 1
